title: SIAL Portable Electric Heater 2000W Ceramic Fan Space Heaters 3 Settings & Adjustable Thermostat（Yellow）
features: 【INSTANT HEATING】:This portable electric heater P2 uses advanced ceramic heating technology to provide warmth and comfort for your small rooms.3S quick heating, whether you are in the indoor garden or the sun room, you can enjoy the warmth of spring

【ENERGY SAVING AND ECONOMICAL】: Designed for small rooms, the heater P2 avoids the energy waste associated with switching on a central heating system. It is not only energy efficient, but also economical and practical, making it ideal for small office spaces and individual work areas

【QUALITY GUARANTEED】: We focus on the durability of our products, and the P2 compact heater has earned the trust of our customers with its longer life and superior quality. Carefully selected materials and precision craftsmanship ensure product stability and reliability

【PORTABLE USE】: The product is small in size, weighing just 2.3 kg/5.07 lbs. Combined with the practical handle, it's easy to carry. Industrial heater with wind direction adjustment feet from 0° to 30°

【USAGE SCENARIOS】:SIAL compact heaters provide localised mobile heating for small rooms ,garage,construction sites, workshops, apartment, basements, outdoor party, emergency shelter or covered outdoor spaces, tents and campsites
